markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To review and improve content strategy approaches for technical clients like Galileo and Promptfoo.](https://fathom.video/share/Xnes8HqbzwB5MvPxbvipx4LKqhZPLPC4?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on deep, high-quality content that demonstrates expertise in the client's domain](https://fathom.video/share/Xnes8HqbzwB5MvPxbvipx4LKqhZPLPC4?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
  - [Use client documentation, research papers, and tools like ChatGPT to create comprehensive knowledge graphs](https://fathom.video/share/Xnes8HqbzwB5MvPxbvipx4LKqhZPLPC4?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [Prioritize relevance and specificity over keyword volume in early stages of engagements](https://fathom.video/share/Xnes8HqbzwB5MvPxbvipx4LKqhZPLPC4?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
  - [Leverage competitive research and automated workflows to efficiently generate large content backlogs](https://fathom.video/share/Xnes8HqbzwB5MvPxbvipx4LKqhZPLPC4?tab=summary&timestamp=1727.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Refinement

  - [Avoid expressing uncertainty about competitors during presentations](https://fathom.video/share/Xnes8HqbzwB5MvPxbvipx4LKqhZPLPC4?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Research topic clusters thoroughly to benchmark against content competitors](https://fathom.video/share/Xnes8HqbzwB5MvPxbvipx4LKqhZPLPC4?tab=summary&timestamp=22.0)
  - [Aim to become an expert in the client's domain through the research process](https://fathom.video/share/Xnes8HqbzwB5MvPxbvipx4LKqhZPLPC4?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [Focus on quality over quantity, especially in early stages of technical engagements](https://fathom.video/share/Xnes8HqbzwB5MvPxbvipx4LKqhZPLPC4?tab=summary&timestamp=1077.0)

### Research and Ideation Process

  - [Utilize tools like Perplexity.com and ChatGPT for deep learning and ideation](https://fathom.video/share/Xnes8HqbzwB5MvPxbvipx4LKqhZPLPC4?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
  - [Create comprehensive knowledge graphs around client's ecosystem](https://fathom.video/share/Xnes8HqbzwB5MvPxbvipx4LKqhZPLPC4?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [Generate topic clusters and potential article types using AI-assisted brainstorming](https://fathom.video/share/Xnes8HqbzwB5MvPxbvipx4LKqhZPLPC4?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [Explore persona-based approaches for certain clients (e.g., small business owners)](https://fathom.video/share/Xnes8HqbzwB5MvPxbvipx4LKqhZPLPC4?tab=summary&timestamp=1459.0)

### Keyword Research and Content Backlog Creation

  - [Use SEMrush for competitor keyword gap analysis](https://fathom.video/share/Xnes8HqbzwB5MvPxbvipx4LKqhZPLPC4?tab=summary&timestamp=1672.0)
  - [Import keyword data into Airtable and create URL clusters](https://fathom.video/share/Xnes8HqbzwB5MvPxbvipx4LKqhZPLPC4?tab=summary&timestamp=2837.0)
  - [Apply relevance scoring to filter and prioritize content ideas](https://fathom.video/share/Xnes8HqbzwB5MvPxbvipx4LKqhZPLPC4?tab=summary&timestamp=3129.0)
  - [Present large content backlogs (e.g., 2,500+ potential assignments) to impress clients](https://fathom.video/share/Xnes8HqbzwB5MvPxbvipx4LKqhZPLPC4?tab=summary&timestamp=3173.0)

### Technical Content Approaches

  - [Define terminology and create "What is" articles for complex topics](https://fathom.video/share/Xnes8HqbzwB5MvPxbvipx4LKqhZPLPC4?tab=summary&timestamp=782.0)
  - [Develop beginner's guides and practical guides for technical concepts](https://fathom.video/share/Xnes8HqbzwB5MvPxbvipx4LKqhZPLPC4?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
  - [Create listicles for courses, research papers, people to follow, and conferences](https://fathom.video/share/Xnes8HqbzwB5MvPxbvipx4LKqhZPLPC4?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Focus on highly relevant, specific topics like LLM red teaming, prompt injection, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/Xnes8HqbzwB5MvPxbvipx4LKqhZPLPC4?tab=summary&timestamp=731.0)

## Next Steps

  - Share the meeting recording and prompts used in ChatGPT with team members
  - [Continue developing automated workflows to streamline the research and ideation process](https://fathom.video/share/Xnes8HqbzwB5MvPxbvipx4LKqhZPLPC4?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)
  - [Create more documentation and videos on content strategy approaches](https://fathom.video/share/Xnes8HqbzwB5MvPxbvipx4LKqhZPLPC4?tab=summary&timestamp=3275.0)
  - [Vianca to align with Marcel on the next batch of selected topics before the next client meeting](https://fathom.video/share/Xnes8HqbzwB5MvPxbvipx4LKqhZPLPC4?tab=summary&timestamp=3439.0)
  - [Team to apply learned techniques to ongoing client projects (Galileo, Promptfoo)](https://fathom.video/share/Xnes8HqbzwB5MvPxbvipx4LKqhZPLPC4?tab=summary&timestamp=3409.0)
